description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:11 Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test_all job that runs `yarn` then `yarn test`. In the deploy stage add three jobs: npm_canary, npm_latest, and npm_next. The npm_canary job runs only on the master branch, sets the npm auth token, runs `yarn`, `yarn build`, sets VERSION_HASH from the commit SHA and runs `node tools/versionHash`, then changes directory to npm/effector and publishes with `npm publish`, targeting the npm_canary environment at https://www.npmjs.com/package/@effector/canary. The npm_latest job also runs only on master, echoes a message with `echo "publish npm latest"`, runs `yarn`, sets the npm auth token, and publishes the latest version with `node tools/build publish latest` to the npm environment at https://www.npmjs.com/package/effector. The npm_next job runs only on master, is manual, echoes a message with `echo "publish npm next"`, runs `yarn`, sets the npm auth token, and publishes the next version with `node tools/build publish next` to the same npm environment.
